evals.prompt: What should I fix first on my site? Give me a prioritized SEO action list from the merged data.
evals.expected_output: Should load the newest merged dataset from data/merged, run every deterministic rule (striking distance, low CTR vs position, high impressions/zero conversions, decay, cannibalization fold-in), score each 0-100, sort by priority, and save a dated JSON report.
assertions: Triggers on 'what should I fix' / 'action list' / 'prioritize' language
Loads the newest merged dataset (or instructs to run /nod-merger if none exists)
Produces opportunities with type, target, evidence, priority (0-100), and recommended_action

evals.prompt: Run the opportunity detector on the demo data and show me the striking-distance and low-CTR quick wins.
evals.expected_output: Should run detect.py --demo on sample_merged.json, group output by opportunity type, surface striking-distance items (position 5-15) and low-CTR-vs-position items, and note that the decay rule is skipped because the fixture is a single snapshot.
assertions: Runs with the --demo flag against sample_merged.json
Flags striking-distance rows with position between 5 and 15 above the impression floor
Flags rows whose CTR is materially below the expected-CTR-by-position curve
Skips the decay rule with a note (single snapshot, no prior to compare)
Does not call the NodesHub API

evals.prompt: I have GA4 connected. Which pages get traffic but no conversions, and fold in any cannibalization conflicts you find.
evals.expected_output: Should flag by_url rows with high impressions/clicks but conversions == 0 (intent/landing mismatch), and fold high/medium conflicts from the latest data/cannibalization/{date}.json report into the opportunity list with their recommendations.
assertions: Flags high-impression URLs with zero GA4 conversions as opportunities
Skips the conversion rule when GA4 is absent or conversions are not exported
Folds high and medium cannibalization conflicts in as opportunities when a report exists
Maps cannibalization severity onto the shared 0-100 priority scale
Skips the cannibalization fold-in quietly when no report exists
